authors: Jonathan Kropf Jörn Lamla Markus Uhlmann Faculty of Social Sciences
raw_title: Pricing, Design and Cultivation – Conceptual Tools for the Normative Assessment of Fairness in the Age of Media Platformization
title_en: Pricing, Design and Cultivation – Conceptual Tools for the Normative Assessment of Fairness in the Age of Media Platformization
title_zh: 定价、设计与培育——媒体平台化时代公平性规范评估的概念工具
plain_summary_zh: 这篇文章探讨了在媒体越来越依赖平台的背景下，如何评估公平性。作者提出了三个概念工具——定价、设计和培育——来帮助判断媒体平台是否公平运作。这些工具旨在为研究人员和从业者提供分析框架，以应对平台化带来的挑战。
plain_summary_en: This article examines how to assess fairness as media increasingly relies on platforms. The authors propose three conceptual tools—pricing, design, and cultivation—to help evaluate whether media platforms operate fairly. These tools aim to provide analytical frameworks for researchers and practitioners to address challenges posed by platformization.
research_direction_zh: 研究媒体平台化对新闻业和社会公平的影响，开发规范性评估工具以指导平台治理和媒体政策。
research_direction_en: Investigating the impact of media platformization on journalism and social fairness, developing normative assessment tools to guide platform governance and media policy.
